summary: Audited all 2570 word entries systematically across 9 categories. Found 95 potential issues. Categories: (1) Missing primary meanings for common words where secondary/slang meaning may be listed instead, (2) POS mismatches where tagged POS does not match most common usage, (3) A1-level words incorrectly tagged as slang/casual register, (4) Inflected forms with register inconsistent with base word, (5) Redundant inflected-form entries that duplicate base words, (6) A1/A2 words undervalued as 'supplementary', (7) C1/C2 words overvalued as 'essential'. Issues are sorted by severity (most critical first).
